notes: Estimates by char/4 rule. Inputs: baseline = brief.md only; candidate = brief.md + nature-figure/SKILL.md + references/api.md + references/common-patterns.md (the references that the candidate script actually applied — pattern based + palette based). Outputs: chars of generated .py script. Wall time = `/usr/bin/time -p` real seconds for matplotlib render only (not the Codex generation step, which is bookkeeping not measurement). The 25x input premium reflects the skill itself; if MinionsOS imports the skill into the Writer role's discoverable skill set, the cost is paid once at wake-up, not per figure.
